name: India Motor Parts & Accessories Limited
summary: India Motor Parts & Accessories Limited, together with its subsidiary, sells and distributes automobile spare parts and accessories in India. It primarily offers engine group components; brake parts, fluid, and systems; steering parts and linkages; and hex, sockets, fasteners, radiators, suspensions, axles, auto electricals, wheels, instrument clusters, etc. The company was incorporated in 1954 and is based in Chennai, India.
